title: eYone Baby Blanket 80×110 cm - Soft Fleece & Sherpa - Pram, Cot & Stroller - Newborn Gift for Boys - Blue
features: SOFT FLEECE & WARM SHERPA: Double-layer design with cosy fleece on the front and fluffy sherpa backing - gentle on newborn skin and snug in any season.
PRACTICAL 80×110 CM SIZE: Spacious blanket grows with your baby - perfect for naps, tummy time, nursery and travel.
CLASSIC BABY BLUE: Traditional shade makes a timeless gift for boys - ideal for newborn celebrations, christenings and first birthdays.
EASY CARE & DURABLE: Machine washable at 30°C, quick-drying and designed to keep its softness and shape wash after wash.
SAFE & VERSATILE: Skin-friendly materials provide cosy warmth without irritation - practical for car seats, stroller walks, or as a nursery throw.
description: Product Description Softness and Comfort Provide a cozy and comforting feel, making them perfect for snuggling and providing warmth to your little one. The soft texture is gentle against a baby's delicate skin, ensuring maximum comfort. Easy Care Machine-washable, the high quality fabric is resistant to shrinking and wrinkling Generously Sized Size matters, that’s why our blanket is considerably large 110x80 cm, ensuring that your baby, toddler, or infant can enjoy ultimate warmth and comfort Thorough Workmanship Careful stitching enhances the strength of our eYone Baby Blankets at the seams, resulting in increased durability and an integrated, elegant appearance
